svg.title: IAM role, instance profile, and SSM connection flow
svg.desc: How a policy attaches to a role, which is wrapped in an instance profile, which is attached to EC2, enabling the SSM agent to authenticate and connect without SSH.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is an IAM role and how does it differ from a user?')
sendPrompt('Why does EC2 need an instance profile instead of a role directly?')
sendPrompt('How does EC2 expose the IAM credentials to the SSM agent?')
sendPrompt('What is the EC2 instance metadata service?')
sendPrompt('What does the SSM agent do on startup?')
g.text: Uses creds to register + open tunnel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AWS SSM run commands without SSH?')
sendPrompt('How do I run a command via SSM Run Command?')
